name: applyr-workspace
description: applyr monorepo root — npm workspaces for the shared TS core, the Ink TUI, and the Tauri desktop app.

scripts.build:app: npm run build:core && npm run build --workspace=app
scripts.typecheck:app: npm run build:core && npm run typecheck --workspace=app
scripts.smoke:app: npm run build:app && npm run smoke --workspace=app
